_comment: Derived from prototype/index.html BALANCE constant (Step 1 extraction 2026-04-19). Port target: Godot 4 Resource (res://data/balance.tres). Percent-per-wave values compound; age values are multiplicative per age.

match._comment: waveCount stays at 3 for the tutorial/skirmish quick match; waveCountFullConceptDemo=11 (one wave per age) is read by the Co-op Horde mode + Phase 10.2 11-age solo matches. Phase 10.1 lands the constant; Phase 10.2 wires consumers.

coop._comment: Shared-economy Co-op Horde (plan 10.3). Both players draw from same gold/knowledge pool; towers tagged with ownerPeerId for visual differentiation.

save._comment: Honors CONCEPT §4.9 + decisions/2026-04-20-save-model.md mode-split. Autosave fires on a debounced 2-minute timer for Solo Campaign; Skirmish/Horde save only on end; Lane Wars does not save.

progression._comment: Decisions/2026-04-20-commander-identity-floor.md: 20-level ladder [PROPOSAL]. xpPer values [PROPOSAL] — tuned to ~1 level per 2-3 wins mid-progression.
